title: Slack daily roundup of items

posts.author: Emyli (Emyli Gudmundson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is is possible to send a daily round up to a slack channel with all items in a board that meet certain criteria?

Example use case:
We track email sends in Monday, including copy status and build status. Instead of notifying the build team every time an item is marked ‘ready to build’, can we send a morning slack message that says, “These items are marked as ‘ready to build’ in this board”

posts.author: MikeB_Axanexa (Mike Buckiewicz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Emyli,

Notifications can be sent at a board level through the Slack integration that is on your board easily based on timing if you would like.

That would be my recommendation and partner with a dashboard so the link is easy to find with the correct filters!

If you need help just reach out! Contact Us - Axanexa

Mike B
Automation Architect
